languages.original_text: "How curious, colleague, I never thought you would be drawn to such superficial analysis. Who knows what secrets might be teased out in discussions with the laity who have taken refuge here?"

languages.text: "Любопытно, коллега, не думал, что вам свойственна тяга лишь к поверхностному анализу. Кто знает какие тайны можно извлечь из дискуссий с мирянами, нашедшими здесь пристанище?"
"How curious, colleague, I never thought you would be drawn to such superficial analysis. Who knows what secrets might be teased out in discussions with the laity who have taken refuge here?"
languages.original_text: "Любопытно, коллега, не думал, что вам свойственна тяга лишь к поверхностному анализу. Кто знает какие тайны можно извлечь из дискуссий с мирянами, нашедшими здесь пристанище?"

traits.locale_text: "How curious, colleague, I never thought you would be drawn to such superficial analysis. Who knows what secrets might be teased out in discussions with the laity who have taken refuge here?"
"How curious, colleague, I never thought you would be drawn to such superficial analysis. Who knows what secrets might be teased out in discussions with the laity who have taken refuge here?"
"How curious, colleague, I never thought you would be drawn to such superficial analysis. Who knows what secrets might be teased out in discussions with the laity who have taken refuge here?"

languages.text: «Qué curioso, colega. Nunca pensé que se dejaría llevar por un análisis tan superficial. ¿Quién sabe qué secretos podremos obtener en las conversaciones con los laicos que se han refugiado aquí?».
languages.original_text: "How curious, colleague, I never thought you would be drawn to such superficial analysis. Who knows what secrets might be teased out in discussions with the laity who have taken refuge here?"

traits.locale_text: «Qué curioso, colega. Nunca pensé que se dejaría llevar por un análisis tan superficial. ¿Quién sabe qué secretos podremos obtener en las conversaciones con los laicos que se han refugiado aquí?».

languages.text: 「なんと興味深い、同僚。あなたがそのような表面的な分析に惹かれるとは、思いもよりませんでした。ここに身を寄せた世俗の者たちとの対話から、どのような秘密が引き出せるか、知れたものではありませんよ」
languages.original_text: "How curious, colleague, I never thought you would be drawn to such superficial analysis. Who knows what secrets might be teased out in discussions with the laity who have taken refuge here?"

traits.locale_text: 「なんと興味深い、同僚。あなたがそのような表面的な分析に惹かれるとは、思いもよりませんでした。ここに身を寄せた世俗の者たちとの対話から、どのような秘密が引き出せるか、知れたものではありませんよ」

languages.text: “真是有趣，同僚。我从未想过你会被这种浮于表面的分析所吸引。谁知道与在这里避难的教外人士讨论，还能引出什么秘密呢？”
languages.original_text: "How curious, colleague, I never thought you would be drawn to such superficial analysis. Who knows what secrets might be teased out in discussions with the laity who have taken refuge here?"

traits.locale_text: “真是有趣，同僚。我从未想过你会被这种浮于表面的分析所吸引。谁知道与在这里避难的教外人士讨论，还能引出什么秘密呢？”

languages.text: "Das ist ja interessant, Kollege. Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass Ihr Euch für so triviale Analysen interessiert. Wer weiß, welche Geheimnisse eine Befragung der Laien ans Licht bringen könnte, die hier Zuflucht gesucht haben?"
languages.original_text: "How curious, colleague, I never thought you would be drawn to such superficial analysis. Who knows what secrets might be teased out in discussions with the laity who have taken refuge here?"

traits.locale_text: "Das ist ja interessant, Kollege. Ich hätte nie gedacht, dass Ihr Euch für so triviale Analysen interessiert. Wer weiß, welche Geheimnisse eine Befragung der Laien ans Licht bringen könnte, die hier Zuflucht gesucht haben?"

languages.text: « Comme c'est étrange, honorable collègue. Je n'aurais jamais pensé que vous nourririez un tel attrait pour les analyses superficielles. Qui sait quels secrets nous pourrions tirer des discussions avec les profanes qui ont trouvé refuge ici ? »
languages.original_text: "How curious, colleague, I never thought you would be drawn to such superficial analysis. Who knows what secrets might be teased out in discussions with the laity who have taken refuge here?"

traits.locale_text: « Comme c'est étrange, honorable collègue. Je n'aurais jamais pensé que vous nourririez un tel attrait pour les analyses superficielles. Qui sait quels secrets nous pourrions tirer des discussions avec les profanes qui ont trouvé refuge ici ? »

languages.text: "Ne kadar ilginç meslektaşım, böyle yüzeysel bir analize çekileceğinizi hiç düşünmezdim. Buraya sığınan ruhban dışı sınıfla yapılacak tartışmalarda ne gibi sırların ortaya çıkabileceğini kim bilebilir?"
languages.original_text: "How curious, colleague, I never thought you would be drawn to such superficial analysis. Who knows what secrets might be teased out in discussions with the laity who have taken refuge here?"

traits.locale_text: "Ne kadar ilginç meslektaşım, böyle yüzeysel bir analize çekileceğinizi hiç düşünmezdim. Buraya sığınan ruhban dışı sınıfla yapılacak tartışmalarda ne gibi sırların ortaya çıkabileceğini kim bilebilir?"
